name: Will to survive
description:
"Who... Who are you?"

Survivor!POV


Colin, everyone knows who is he; the main protagonist in the video game Changed. The setting develops in the well-known fan-game Changed Berserk, so prepare any weapon and survive beside him or surrender to the Latex Beasts. All is your decision.

The Latex Creature that I implemented are; Dark Latex, Light/White Latex, Latex Bacteriophages, Wendigo, Tiger shark, Squid Dog and, why not, Snep. I have planned to update this bot to add more characters like; Puro, Prototype, Dr. K, and others...

Damn...2515 perm tokens that's crazy, I don't know how much I wrote, but that amount tells me that I wrote a...reasonable amount.

Update(11/11/24)=Ok, added Puro and Dr. K, but I feel that there is not so much description about them, but I hope it works as it should
creator: Iweren
